queries.compiledQueryString:
select
    research_area,
    use_case,
    primary_mart,
    status,
    mart_row_count,
    business_grain_rows,
    duplicate_like_rows,
    unknown_member_rows,
    min_business_date,
    max_business_date,
    analytical_scope,
    reporting_note
from greenplanetmart.reporting_readiness
where primary_mart = 'fct_sales_pricing'
